EpithelialSegmentation

Mohammad Samsul Alam

2022-06-23

Reading an image

library(imager) # package for reading image
library(dbscan) # package for dbscan
library(tidyverse) # package for data manipulation
library(dplyr) # package for data manipulation
library(ggplot2) # package for plotting
img<-load.image("/Users/samsul/Project2WSI/peso_testset_png/1.jpg")
plot(img)

#RedI<-as.numeric(R(img))
#GreenI<-as.numeric(G(img))
#BlueI<-as.numeric(B(img))
#dat<-data.frame(RedI,GreenI,BlueI)
#kfit<-kmeans(dat,centers = 3,nstart = 10)
#ep_cls<-as.numeric(which.min(apply(kfit$centers^2,1,sum)))
#kfit$size
#RowCol<-data.frame(expand.grid(1:2500,1:2500))
#dat<-dat %>%mutate(Row=RowCol$Var1,Col=RowCol$Var2)
#Edat<-dat %>%mutate(Cluster=kfit$cluster) %>% filter(Cluster==ep_cls)
#Edat<-Edat %>%mutate(GInten=0.3*RedI+0.59*GreenI+0.11*BlueI)
#EDAT<-Edat %>%filter(scale(GInten)< -2)
#dbdat<-EDAT %>%select(c(Row,Col)) %>%mutate(Row=Row/2500,Col=Col/2500)
#kNNdistplot(dbdat,k=3)
#db_fit<-dbscan(dbdat,eps=0.0005,minPts = 4)
#Ddat<-EDAT %>%mutate(Cluster=db_fit$cluster) %>%filter(Cluster>0)
#ggplot(Ddat,aes(Row,Col))+geom_point(pch=20,cex=0.1)

Steps followed are summarized below

  • Separate the red, green and blue intensity and vectorize them
  • Construct a data frame using the red, green and blue intensity
  • Construct and assign row and column index with the vectorize pixels
  • Split into patches based by constructing grid for rows and columns
  • Assign grid label with every pixel by taking interactio of row and column grid labels
  • Calculate the gray scale intensity for all the pixels
  • Perform grid wise thresholding based on gray scale intensity (can also be done initially)
  • Apply dbscan and summarize cluster center for every patch in the grid
RedI<-as.numeric(R(img)) # extraction of red intensity and vectorization (columns are appended)
GreenI<-as.numeric(G(img)) # extraction of green intensity and vectorization
BlueI<-as.numeric(B(img)) # extraction of blue intensity and vectorization
dat<-data.frame(RedI,GreenI,BlueI) # a dataframe with Red, Green and Blue intensity
RowCol<-data.frame(expand.grid(1:2500,1:2500)) # Construction of Row and Column index
dat<-dat %>%mutate(Row=RowCol$Var1,Col=RowCol$Var2) # Addidng the row and column index in the data frame
Dat<-dat %>% mutate(GInten=0.3*RedI+0.59*GreenI+0.11*BlueI) # Creation of grayscale intensity
Dat<-Dat %>%mutate(RGrid=cut(Row,breaks = seq(1,2501,by=250)-1,include.lowest = TRUE,labels=1:10)) # row wise partitioning
Dat<-Dat %>%mutate(CGrid=cut(Col,breaks = seq(1,2501,by=250)-1,include.lowest = TRUE,labels=1:10)) # column wise partitioning
Dat <-Dat %>%mutate(GridI=interaction(RGrid,CGrid)) # Construction of grid levels
TDat<-Dat %>%group_by(GridI) %>%filter(GInten<=0.35) # Grid wise thresholding and storing in a new data frame
sdata<-split.data.frame(TDat[,4:5],TDat$GridI) # Grid wise spliting of the data frame for DBscan
grid_lab<-names(sdata) # Storing labels of the splitted data frame
head(grid_lab)
## [1] "1.1" "2.1" "3.1" "4.1" "5.1" "6.1"
dbfit<-lapply(1:length(sdata),FUN = function(u){
  if(dim(sdata[[u]])[1]==0){
    NULL 
  } else{
    temp_dat<-sdata[[u]]
    dbft<-dbscan(temp_dat,eps=sqrt(2)+0.001,minPts = 8)
    temp_dat$clust<-dbft$cluster
    temp_dat$Grid<-grid_lab[u]
    temp_dat %>%filter(clust>0) %>%group_by(clust) %>%summarise(Xcor=mean(Row),Ycor=mean(Col),Grid=unique(Grid))
  }
}) # performs dbscan on each patch and summarizes the center of the clusters

spt_dat<-do.call(rbind,dbfit) # construction of a single data frame for all the patches
sub_spt_dat<-spt_dat %>%subset(Grid=="1.1"|Grid=="2.1"|Grid=="5.5"|Grid=="8.7")
ggplot(sub_spt_dat,aes(Xcor%%250,Ycor%%250))+geom_point(pch=20)+facet_wrap(~Grid)
